creator: s_bschmi@ira.uka.de
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Benedikt Schmidt
>Organization:	
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	Re: ports/26472: Update port: editors/jed
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	low
>Category:	ports
>Class:		update
>Release:	FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE i386
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD wn4-marvin.wn4.uni-karlsruhe.de 4.3-STABLE FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE #0: Wed Jun 27 02:22:53 CEST 2001 steele@wn4-marvin.wn4.uni-karlsruhe.de:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/STEELE i386


>Description:
    Maintainer didn't respond to PR 26472 (Tue Apr 10 00:40:01 PDT 2001).
    A new version has been released since then, so here is a new diff.

    Update to version 0.99.14
    -Change NO_XJED to WITHOUT_X11
    -Fix make -DWITHOUT_X11 package target
    -add %%PORTDOCS%% to pkg-list
>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:
diff -urN jed.orig/Makefile jed/Makefile
--- jed.orig/Makefile	Tue Jun 26 21:31:28 2001
+++ jed/Makefile	Tue Jun 26 22:06:28 2001
@@ -6,32 +6,30 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	jed
-PORTVERSION=	0.98.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.99.14
 CATEGORIES=	editors
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://space.mit.edu/pub/davis/jed/v0.98/
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}0.98-7
-
-PATCH_SITES=	ftp://space.mit.edu/pub/davis/jed/v0.98/
-PATCHFILES=	BUGS
-PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://space.mit.edu/pub/davis/jed/v0.99/
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-B0.99-14
 
 MAINTAINER=	eric@cybernut.com
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	slang.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libslang
 
-USE_XLIB=	yes
 
-.if !defined(NO_XJED)
+.if !defined(WITHOUT_X11)
+USE_XLIB=	yes
 XJED=	xjed
+PLIST_SUB+=  	NOXJED=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=		NOXJED="@comment "
 .endif
 
 DIST_SUBDIR=	jed
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-PATCH_DIST_ARGS=	-d ${WRKSRC}/src --quiet -E ${PATCH_DIST_STRIP}
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	JED_ROOT=${PREFIX}/lib/jed
 ALL_TARGET=	all getmail ${XJED}
 INSTALL_TARGET=	install
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/jed
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/jed-B0.99-14
 MAN1=		jed.1 rgrep.1
 
 pre-install:
@@ -45,15 +43,18 @@
 	strip ${PREFIX}/bin/xjed
 .endif
 	${CP} -R ${WRKSRC}/lib/* ${PREFIX}/lib/jed/lib
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/info/jed.* ${PREFIX}/info
+	-${RM} ${PREFIX}/lib/jed/info/*
 	-${RMDIR} ${PREFIX}/lib/jed/info
+	-${RM} ${PREFIX}/lib/jed/doc/txt/*
+	-${RMDIR} ${PREFIX}/lib/jed/doc/txt
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/jed
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/README ${WRKSRC}/doc/*.txt \
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/txt/*.txt \
 		${PREFIX}/share/doc/jed
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/info/jed.* ${PREFIX}/info
 	install-info --section="Miscellaneous" \
 		--entry="* JED: (jed).			JED editor documentation." \
-		${PREFIX}/info/jed.info ${PREFIX}/info/dir
+	${PREFIX}/info/jed.info ${PREFIX}/info/dir
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -urN jed.orig/distinfo jed/distinfo
--- jed.orig/distinfo	Tue Jun 26 21:31:28 2001
+++ jed/distinfo	Tue Jun 26 21:57:29 2001
@@ -1,2 +1 @@
-MD5 (jed/jed0.98-7.tar.gz) = 868a0003cc169fbd559273085c838d78
-MD5 (jed/BUGS) = 4298e5377716887b755e2b7809a051b1
+MD5 (jed/jed-B0.99-14.tar.gz) = 15d5f560e6f74ac2a406f20a21fff340
diff -urN jed.orig/files/patch-aa jed/files/patch-aa
--- jed.orig/files/patch-aa	Tue Jun 26 21:31:28 2001
+++ jed/files/patch-aa	Tue Jun 26 21:48:28 2001
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
---- src/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Oct 13 19:12:49 1998
-+++ src/Makefile.in	Tue Oct 13 19:13:55 1998
-@@ -121,7 +121,7 @@
+--- src/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Apr 10 01:54:31 2001
++++ src/Makefile.in	Tue Apr 10 01:56:43 2001
+@@ -143,7 +143,7 @@
  rgrep: $(OBJDIR)/rgrep
  	@echo rgrep created in $(OBJDIR)
  $(OBJDIR)/rgrep: $(OBJDIR)/vfile.o $(OBJDIR)/rgrep.o
--	cd $(OBJDIR); $(CC) vfile.o rgrep.o -o rgrep $(LDFLAGS) -L$(SLANG_LIB_DIR) -lslang
-+	cd $(OBJDIR); $(CC) vfile.o rgrep.o -o rgrep $(LDFLAGS) -L$(SLANG_LIB_DIR) -lslang $(TERMCAP_LIB)
+-	cd $(OBJDIR); $(CC) vfile.o rgrep.o -o rgrep $(LDFLAGS) $(SLANG_LIB) -lslang
++	cd $(OBJDIR); $(CC) vfile.o rgrep.o -o rgrep $(LDFLAGS) $(SLANG_LIB) -lslang $(TERMCAP_LIB)
  #
  getmail: $(OBJDIR)/getmail
  	@echo getmail created in $(OBJDIR)
diff -urN jed.orig/pkg-plist jed/pkg-plist

+++ jed/pkg-plist	Tue Jun 26 21:48:28 2001

-bin/xjed
-@unexec install-info --delete --section="Miscellaneous" --entry="* JED: (jed).			JED editor documentation." %D/info/jed.info %D/info/dir
-info/jed.1in
-info/jed.2in
-info/jed.3in
-info/jed.info
-@exec install-info --section="Miscellaneous" --entry="* JED: (jed).			JED editor documentation." %D/info/jed.info %D/info/dir
+%%NOXJED%%bin/xjed
+%%PORTDOCS%%@unexec install-info --delete --section="Miscellaneous" --entry="* JED: (jed).			JED editor documentation." %D/info/jed.info %D/info/dir
+%%PORTDOCS%%info/jed.1in
+%%PORTDOCS%%info/jed.2in
+%%PORTDOCS%%info/jed.3in
+%%PORTDOCS%%info/jed.info
